data.short_description: Cook Out's website lists a new location at 10820 Woodland Beaver Road in Charlotte, NC. No opening timeline has been announced. The company is also acquiring properties in Thomasville, NC as part of broader regional expansion.

data.location: 1114, 1116, 1118 Lambeth Street and 1704, 1708 Liberty Drive, Thomasville, NC
data.status: land acquisition for potential future development
data.short_description: Cook Out acquired five adjacent properties in Thomasville, NC for approximately $1.07 million. The purchase is part of over $10 million in real estate investment since early 2023. No development timeline has been announced.

data.location: South Denver, CO (no specific address provided)
data.short_description: Entrepreneur Andrew Schuman has signed a seven-unit franchise deal to bring Smalls Sliders to South Denver. No specific addresses or opening timeline have been announced. The brand is known for its shipping container "Can" storefronts and simple slider menu.

data.location: 11625 Bandera Rd, Suite 105, San Antonio, TX 78250
data.status: slated to begin construction on June 1, 2026
data.short_description: Permit records filed with the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation indicate Another Broken Egg Cafe is planned for Bandera Pointe in Northwest San Antonio. The 3,300-square-foot interior renovation project has an estimated construction cost of $550,000. Construction is set to begin June 1, 2026, with completion expected in late February 2027.

data.status: expected to open in the Fenway by early June 2026
data.short_description: Joe's Pizza is set to open its second Greater Boston location at 1363 Boylston St in the Fenway neighborhood. The 1,900-square-foot space has already undergone a full renovation. Daily hours will start at 10 a.m., running as late as 1 a.m. with plans to extend further over time.

data.status: soft launch in August (2026); grand opening planned for early 2027
data.short_description: Wine, Darling! is a nightlife-forward wine bar concept opening in phases inside the historic Crown Hotel Building in Pioneer Square. A temporary "Footy On First" World Cup activation will begin in June 2026, followed by a soft launch in August 2026. The approximately 4,000-square-foot venue will feature live entertainment, music, comedy, drag shows, and a full kitchen by the planned February 2027 grand opening.

Crepe Haven is an upcoming dessert cafe planned for 7474 Corporate Blvd in Baton Rouge, currently hiring staff. The menu will include sweet crepes, dessert waffles, mini pancakes, specialty lattes, and milkshakes. An opening date has not been announced.

data.status: closing its location in the plaza after 25 years
data.short_description: Serop's Café announced in December that it would be closing its long-time location at the Corporate Blvd plaza after 25 years. No further closure details are provided in the article.

Denver-based Trompeau Bakery is opening its third location at 3239 E 2nd Avenue in Cherry Creek, with the owner hoping to introduce the business sometime in the fall. The new location will offer baked goods, bread, sandwiches, salads, and ice cream. The bakery has been in operation since 2001.

data.status: secured the purchase of a building; plans unknown
data.short_description: Chamblee Tap and Market has secured the purchase of a three-story building at 2881 N. Main St. in Kennesaw, approved by the Kennesaw Development Authority. The planned concept for the space has not yet been announced. What Now Atlanta has reached out for additional details.

Birdcall opened a location at 2001 Blake St in Denver. The restaurant serves chicken sandwiches and salads and is noted as being available to home game attendees. No further opening details are provided in the article.

A new lounge called Parea was opened by Mile High nightlife veteran Regas Christou at 40 E 11th Ave in Denver. The article describes it as part of an expansion of his hospitality portfolio. No further details are provided.

Emagine Entertainment opened its first Colorado theater in Parker at 18625 Stage Run, converting the former AMC Classic Twenty Mile 10 into a luxury cinema. No further opening details are provided in the article.

data.location: 7824 Park Meadows Dr #300, Lone Tree, CO 80124
data.short_description: Venalonzo's Tacos, a local family-owned Mexican restaurant, expanded with a third location at 7824 Park Meadows Dr in Lone Tree, CO. No further opening details are provided in the article.

data.location: 4843 Pearl St, Suite A1, Boulder, CO 80301
data.short_description: TooSteppin Brewing opened its first taproom at 4843 Pearl St in Boulder, CO. No further details are provided in the article (text is truncated).

data.location: 4120 Napier St, Suite A & B, San Diego, CA 92110
data.short_description: A recent filing shows Nutmeg Bakery and Cafe is planning a third location at 4120 Napier Street in the Bay Park area of San Diego, currently in permit review. The approximately 2,340-square-foot space will offer gluten-free bakery items and lower-sugar desserts. No opening date has been announced.

data.status: will undergo renovations from July until October
data.short_description: A new HTeaO location is heading to Burnet, TX at 1408 S. Water St., per a filing with the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation. The 2,866-square-foot space will undergo renovations from July through October. Franchisee Marcus Dawes is behind the forthcoming location.

data.location: North San Diego, CA (no specific address provided)
data.status: no exact timeline for these upcoming locations
data.short_description: Local entrepreneur Paul Vignola has signed an agreement to open two 16 Handles units in North San Diego County. No specific addresses or opening timeline have been announced. 16 Handles is a self-serve frozen yogurt brand expanding across California with eight total units planned statewide.

El Palacio de los Jugos filed permit applications with the Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation to open a juice stand and restaurant at 12500 Biscayne Blvd in North Miami. The brand's website confirms the location as "coming soon" with no further opening information available.

data.status: plans to transform Sushi Gaga into a sake-focused bar on June 5
data.short_description: Sake master Ayaka Ito plans to transform her existing Sushi Gaga into Sake Bar Gaga on June 5 at 634 14th Street in Downtown San Diego. The concept features a 10-seat space with a curated rotating selection of more than 20 sakes. Small plates designed to complement sake will be offered by Chef Ryan Miller.

data.location: 339 Baronne St, New Orleans, LA (no zip code provided)
data.short_description: Queen Eats Bistro & Bar began as the Queen Eats & Royal Treats food truck serving soul food dishes and is now transitioning into a brick-and-mortar restaurant at 339 Baronne St in New Orleans. No opening date is provided in the article.

data.location: 3625 Prytania St, New Orleans, LA (no zip code provided)
data.short_description: Bayou Bagel Company built a following in New Orleans as a pop-up and wholesale operation offering bagels in four core flavors. The article mentions the business at this address but provides no details on opening status or dates.

data.location: 2209 Lapalco Blvd, (city/state not specified; no zip code provided)
data.status: expand her business into a brick-and-mortar concept in 2025
data.short_description: Local caterer Alana Lawrence decided to expand into a brick-and-mortar concept in 2025 at 2209 Lapalco Blvd. The space will serve takeout breakfast during the day and transition into a restaurant lounge in the evening. Menu items will carry over popular dishes like lamb chops and Cajun offerings.

data.location: 617 S Spring St, Los Angeles, CA (no zip code provided)
data.short_description: Florentín Rooftop Bar is located in the 20th Century Building at 617 S. Spring St. in Downtown Los Angeles, offering Mediterranean-inspired small plates and signature cocktails in a rooftop setting. The article is a descriptive feature with no opening or closing event details; no event date or status is mentioned.

La Catrachita is expanding to Northeast Philadelphia at 8016 Frankford Ave, in the former Wokworks space, with a halal menu twist. The new location will serve birria tacos, Tex-Mex items, and its signature dishes. An official opening date has not yet been announced, though the team stated a grand opening date is "dropping soon."

Alpenrausch, a Swiss-inspired restaurant that opened in late 2023, announced via social media that it will permanently close on May 30, 2026. No reason for the closure was provided. The restaurant was known for fondue, raclette, venison tartare, kaiserschmarrn, and alpine spirits.

data.status: under construction; soft opening hoped for by end of spring
data.short_description: The Cafe at MOTO is a new coffee concept under construction at 721 Saratoga near downtown Ferndale, designed as a creative studio for artists, engineers, and designers. The cafe will open to members only starting May 16, with a soft opening hoped for by the end of spring. The menu will include fresh-roasted coffee, grab-and-go charcuterie, and European-style sandwiches.

Barakah Beans, a coffee cart launched in March 2025, is planning its first brick-and-mortar cafe at 3262 Vineland Road in Kissimmee per submitted plan review documents. Owner Shams Khazil hopes to open in June or July. The space is still in the design phase and will feature Middle Eastern coffee and tea drinks in addition to the brand's existing offerings.

data.location: 628 Atlantic Blvd, Suite 3, Neptune Beach, FL 32266
data.short_description: Dyne Hospitality Group is planning a new Tropical Smoothie Cafe at 628 Atlantic Blvd, Suite 3 in Neptune Beach, per submitted plan review documents. The location is listed as "COMING SOON" on the Dyne Hospitality Group website. No opening date has been announced.

data.location: 126 San Jose Blvd, Fruit Cove, FL 32259
data.short_description: Al's Yum Yum is opening at 126 San Jose Blvd in St. Johns (Fruit Cove area), per plan review paperwork submitted by Alexander Canni. The cafe will serve hand-scooped ice cream, authentic Italian water ice, gelato, and coffee and espresso. The restaurant has already begun hiring, accepting resumes until May 25.

Better Blend will open its first Tampa Bay area location at 955 E Brandon Blvd in Brandon on June 6, per franchisee Mike Faustini. The menu features high protein, low sugar, low carb smoothies, protein bowls, and oat bowls. This is the first of three planned locations in the Tampa Bay area.

data.status: coming to 1701 W Grand Avenue in early fall; will open sometime in August
data.short_description: Mini City Play Cafe is coming to 1701 W Grand Avenue in West Town, Chicago, with co-owner Amandou Lam confirming an August opening. The space will include playhouses and a full cafe serving coffee from Magnifico Coffee Roasters, targeting children ages 0–6. The concept aims to provide a creative play environment for children while offering parents a place to relax.

data.location: 5400 Marina Dr, Unit A, Holmes Beach, FL 34217
data.short_description: Plan review documents were submitted by Coco Coastal Coffee LLC for a restaurant at 5400 Marina Drive, Unit A in Holmes Beach. Co-owner Clare Dunn was not available for comment, so no menu details or opening date are known at this time.

data.location: 8670 W Sunset Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89148
data.status: introducing a brunch menu this Mother's Day on May 10
data.short_description: Butcher & Thief, an existing southwest Las Vegas steakhouse, is introducing a new brunch menu debuting on Mother's Day, May 10. After the debut, brunch will be served every Sunday from 11 a.m. to 3 p.m. The menu will include egg-focused dishes, sweet selections, and popular lunch items.

data.status: Grand Opening celebration slated for May 15
data.short_description: Sushi by Bou is planning to open a new location in the Financial District inside the FIDI Hotel at 11 Stone St. An exclusive preview is scheduled from May 8 to May 14, followed by a Grand Opening on May 15. The location will feature a 14-seat omakase counter, lounge seating for nearly 30 guests, and an extended lounge menu with sake and cocktails.

data.location: 710 Old Hickory Blvd, Suite 305, Brentwood, TN 37027
data.short_description: HoneyFire Barbeque Co. is opening its third and largest Tennessee location at The Shops at Seven Springs in Brentwood on May 7, 2026. The new space seats up to 200 guests, includes a covered outdoor patio, and features an expanded bourbon bar with rentable bourbon lockers. A ribbon-cutting ceremony is scheduled for May 7 at 11 a.m.

data.location: 2702 N Mission Bay Dr, San Diego, CA 92109
data.short_description: Harland Brewing Co. will operate the new food and beverage program at the Mission Bay Golf Course and Practice Center as Harland Clubhouse, aiming to open in May 2026. The newly built space features 2,000 square feet of indoor dining, an outdoor patio, and a menu of counter-service handhelds including smashburgers, breakfast burritos, and tacos. Future plans include a beverage cart on the driving range and a mobile golf cart serving cold drinks on the course.

data.location: 5130 E Charleston Blvd, Suite 3, Las Vegas, NV 89142
data.status: anticipated to open in Sunrise Manor sometime this year
data.short_description: CeOs Coffee is planning a new location in Sunrise Manor at 5130 E Charleston Blvd, Suite 3, per a Clark County business license. Opening was confirmed by co-owner Ozzy but no further details were available at time of publication. The brand serves hot and cold coffee drinks, frappes, smoothies, pastries, and cakes.

data.status: expected to open in September or October of this year
data.short_description: Arizona-born Turquoise Wine Bar is planning a location in The Woodlands at the Grogan's Mill Village Center at 7 Switchbud Pl, with franchisee Rene Murphy indicating a September or October opening. The wine bar will serve light food, offer live entertainment, and host wine tastings, winemaker dinners, and a wine club. A Cypress, TX location is also planned as the brand's Texas debut ahead of The Woodlands opening.

data.location: 3100 E Charleston Blvd, Suite 104, Las Vegas, NV 89104
data.status: anticipated to open its second location sometime this year
data.short_description: Las Vegas Jerkys is opening a second location inside the Mini Mall at Charleston at 3100 E Charleston Blvd, Suite 104, per a City of Las Vegas permit. The opening was confirmed by the owner's mother, but no further details were available at time of publication. The brand, family-owned since 1991, specializes in Hawaiian-style jerky, candies, dried fruit, nuts, seafood snacks, and gourmet gift baskets.

data.status: expected to reopen by fall; closed during renovations
data.short_description: Läderach Chocolate at 5135 W. Alabama St. in the Houston Galleria is undergoing $400,000 worth of alterations to its 903-square-foot shop, per a recently filed permit. Construction is expected to begin in early August and wrap up by end of October, with the shop suspected to be closed during renovations and expected to reopen by fall. The Läderach marketing team confirmed the construction project but could not share further details.

data.location: 4325 W University Dr, Suite 10, Prosper, TX 75078
data.event_date: Late summer or early fall (year not specified)
data.status: construction projected to begin June 22; wrap by August 21
data.short_description: Summer Moon Coffee is planning a new location at 4325 W University Drive Suite 10 in Prosper, TX, per TDLR filings. The 1,970-square-foot renovated space is projected to begin construction June 22 with completion by August 21, suggesting a late summer or early fall opening. The Texas-based chain, founded in 2002, is known for its wood-fired coffee and signature "moon milk."

data.location: 4021 County Rd 210, Ste 3, St Johns, FL 32259
data.short_description: Amore Mio Pizzeria opened at 4021 County Rd 210 Ste 3 in St. Johns in August 2023 and is approaching its third year in business. The 1,600-square-foot restaurant seats 50 dine-in customers and is known for a New York–Neapolitan hybrid style with fresh daily-made dough. Plans are in the works for expansion to two additional restaurants within the next five years.

data.location: San Fernando Valley / Northridge area, Los Angeles, CA (no specific address provided)
data.status: currently scouting locations; plans to open "as soon as possible"
data.short_description: Franchisee Rockwell Allen and his business partner have signed a two-unit deal to bring 16 Handles to the San Fernando Valley in Los Angeles. They are currently scouting locations in Northridge with no definitive timeline yet. The brand serves 16 rotating soft-serve flavors with more than 50 toppings alongside cakes, take-home pints, and edible cookie dough.

data.location: 500 W Canyon Ridge Dr, Unit L275, Austin, TX 78753
data.status: construction expected to start in July and end in September
data.short_description: A new restaurant called Wonder is planned for 500 W Canyon Ridge Drive, Unit L275, in Austin's Tech Ridge Center, per a TDLR filing. The permit calls for an interior buildout and new signage across a 3,728-square-foot space. Menu and design details have not been disclosed, as a brand representative declined to comment.

data.status: last day of service will be May 11
data.short_description: Johnny's Kitchen and Tap at 1740 Milwaukee Avenue in Glenview is closing on May 11 as the space rebrands to Lake Avenue Tavern. The new concept is debuting in the middle of June, though an official opening date has not yet been confirmed. Johnny's has been part of the Glenview community for over 30 years.

data.status: debuting in the middle of June; official opening date not yet confirmed
data.short_description: Lake Avenue Tavern is the incoming concept replacing Johnny's Kitchen and Tap at 1740 Milwaukee Avenue in Glenview, set to debut in the middle of June. Owner Mary Venezia has not yet confirmed an official opening date. The new concept promises elevated All-American food including steaks, chops, wood-roasted chicken, and BBQ ribs, along with cold beer and crafted cocktails.

data.location: 15 NW 4th Avenue, Portland, OR (no zip code provided)
data.short_description: Pamana is a food truck concept co-owned by Ethan and Geri Leung that will transition into a full-service restaurant at 15 NW 4th Avenue, set to open September 3. No further details about the concept are provided in the article.

data.location: 2203 NE Alberta Street, Portland, OR (no zip code provided)
data.short_description: Aura Dorada is a concept by co-owners Natalia Martinez and Jorge Andrade that promises to combine a café atmosphere with an intimate cocktail bar setting at 2203 NE Alberta Street. No opening date or further event details are provided in the article.

data.location: 3829 SE Division St, Portland, OR (no zip code provided)
data.short_description: Le Fragole is represented by co-owner Jennifer Fabbri and is located at 3829 SE Division St. The concept features Dubai chocolate–covered strawberries, pistachio creations, dark chocolate items, and authentic Italian gelato. No opening date or event status details are provided in the article.

data.location: 4090 N Williams Avenue, Portland, OR (no zip code provided)
data.short_description: Sun Rice is a Filipino American restaurant owned by Ken Tran that started as a farmers market stand, grew into a pop-up residency, and operated as a kiosk at 4090 N. Williams Avenue. No opening date or event status details are provided in the article (text is truncated).

data.status: does not yet have an opening timeline
data.short_description: Phil's BBQ is planning its first Arizona location at 3440 W Chandler Blvd in Chandler, per a city application, taking over a former Abuelo's Mexican Restaurant space. A full renovation of the 10,107-square-foot building is planned, including a complete interior overhaul and updates to the exterior. President and CEO Kevin Sheehan confirmed the project but stated no opening timeline has been set.

data.location: 3300 W Anderson Ln, Suite 303, Austin, TX 78757
data.status: construction slated to begin in June and be completed in spring 2027
data.short_description: Eldorado Cafe is expanding into the adjacent 4,400-square-foot space at Suite 301 at the same address, per a TDLR filing. The expansion will double the restaurant's size, increasing seating from 80 to 150 and adding a second bar. The cafe serves Mexican-inspired comfort food and is open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

US17 New York Deli brings a traditional New York-style deli experience to the Jacksonville area, led by owner Melissa Alcantara. The concept focuses on classic sandwiches made with premium meats and cheeses sliced in-house, alongside bread and bagels sourced from New York City. No opening date or status details are provided in the article.

Davo's Philly Cheesesteaks is a food truck concept delivering a traditional Philadelphia-style cheesesteak experience to the Jacksonville area. No address, opening date, or status details are provided in the article.

data.location: 311 3rd St N, Suite 101, Jacksonville Beach, FL 32250
data.short_description: Bella Vista A'Mare brings Italian cuisine to Jacksonville Beach, led by chef and co-owner Giovanni Prignano, with classic dishes prepared to order. No opening date or status details are provided in the article.

Hot Momma Hotdogs was created by local entrepreneur Carmen Gonzalez and focuses on loaded hot dogs with toppings like chili, cheese, onions, and peppers. No address, opening date, or status details are provided in the article.

data.location: 628 Atlantic Blvd, Suite 4, Neptune Beach, FL 32266
data.short_description: Jeff's Bagel Run is a fast-growing bagel concept at 628 Atlantic Blvd, Suite 4 in Neptune Beach. No opening date or status details are provided in the article (text is truncated).

data.status: An official opening date has not yet been finalized
data.short_description: Dive In Food and Spirits is a new neighborhood dive bar preparing to open at 525 Meeting St in downtown Charleston this spring. The menu will feature hand-patted burgers, confit wings, fries, and house-cut deli meat sandwiches, with a classic cocktail and beer program. An official opening date has not been finalized as the team continues working through permitting.

Ajua Mexican Kitchen & Bar is an existing restaurant at 107 2nd Ave N in Jacksonville Beach offering a modern take on traditional Mexican cuisine inspired by regions such as Oaxaca and Baja. The article is a profile/feature piece on co-owner Prateek Nellulli and the restaurant's concept. No opening or closing event details are present.

Good BBQ Company will open at 3519 N. RM 620 at the Lake Travis Biergarten in Hudson Bend this summer, transitioning from a food trailer to a brick-and-mortar location. The brand serves Texas- and Alabama-inspired barbecue including brisket, pulled pork, and ribs. The team is currently in the process of permitting and hiring, with an exact opening timeline still in the works.

Field Day is a neighborhood bar being developed by Danny and Katie Childs at 923 N. Second St in Philadelphia's Northern Liberties, inside a former movie theater. The concept will feature foraged, hyper-local, and hyper-seasonal cocktails using fermentation, infusions, and ingredients from local farms and their own garden. The space will seat up to 70 people including 18 bar seats, with a central bar as the focal point.

In Crust We Trust is a new pizza shop owned by Anyae Wilson planned to open at 965 Frankford Ave in Fishtown, Philadelphia, in the former Vince's Pizzeria space. The concept highlights Southern flavors and pays homage to Black history in Philadelphia, with an interior thematically connected to the Great Migration. No official opening date has been announced.

data.status: will open in Alpharetta City Center this summer
data.short_description: Giulia Italian Bakery will open its fourth location in Alpharetta City Center this summer, per a press release. The bakery, founded in 2020 by brothers Ben and Seth Gjuka, serves fresh pastries, breads, sandwiches, cakes, gelato, and Italian wine and coffee. Existing locations are in Peachtree Corners and East Cobb.

data.status: hoping to debut in July; not an opening date yet
data.short_description: Table 42 is a new upscale American restaurant with international flair planned for downtown Farmington at 32821 Grand River Avenue, in the former Krazy Crab space. Owner Daniel Hanna is hoping to debut in July but no opening date has been set. The space will feature a full bar with craft beverages and an outdoor patio for 45–50 guests.

Reckless Noodle House, a Pan-Asian restaurant that opened in Denver in 2022, has announced it will permanently close its Denver location. The restaurant's co-owners Bryce Sweeney and Mario Eckert shared through the official website that "after much consideration, we've made the difficult decision to permanently close our restaurant and bar in Denver." The Seattle location will continue operating.

data.status: will be closing its doors at the end of June
data.short_description: My Cousin's, an upscale American restaurant at 954 US-6 in Mahopac, NY, will close at the end of June 2026 after five years of operation. Owner David Gallo announced the closure on social media with a farewell message to the community. The restaurant was named Best Restaurant in Putnam County in 2023.

data.location: 15225 Palisades Village Ln, Pacific Palisades, CA 90272
data.short_description: Blue Ribbon Sushi is preparing to reopen at Palisades Village in August after being closed since the Palisades fires early last year. The reopening will include the addition of Ueki Omakase, a new 14-seat tasting experience led by Chef Hongki Lee. The reimagined space will also feature an expanded Japanese-inspired outdoor patio adding approximately 20 seats.

data.location: 15225 Palisades Village Ln, Pacific Palisades, CA 90272
data.short_description: Ueki Omakase is a new 14-seat tasting experience opening alongside the Blue Ribbon Sushi reopening at Palisades Village, led by Chef Hongki Lee. The concept will center around a hinoki wood sushi bar with multi-course tasting menus featuring fish, shellfish, seasonal offerings, and Japanese Wagyu beef. It will operate Wednesday through Sunday with select seatings.

data.location: 2101 S Decatur Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89102
data.status: anticipated to open before the end of 2026
data.short_description: Hamsa Mediterranean Grill is expected to open a second Las Vegas location at 2101 S Decatur Blvd in the South Decatur Plaza, per a City of Las Vegas permit. The kosher-certified Middle Eastern cuisine brand confirmed the opening but was unable to share further details. The brand's top sellers include Chicken Shawarma and a family Shabbat meal.

data.status: planned to happen before this summer kicks off
data.short_description: Tacos Frontera is opening its third location at 7620 Katy Freeway, Suite 430 in the Marq-E Entertainment Center before summer, per owner Erik Leal. The brand, identified as Houston's first authentic Tijuana-style taqueria, was founded by the Leals in 2023 and opened a second location in Katy in 2025.

data.event_date: Before end of summer (year not specified)
data.short_description: Tacos Frontera will open its fourth location and first franchise store in Pasadena, TX before the end of summer. The franchisee is Alfred Clemesha, who confirmed the opening and timeline. No specific address has been provided.

data.status: slated to open in late summer, approximately four months from now
data.short_description: Crumbl is expanding to the Edgewood Retail District at 1250 Caroline St NE in Atlanta, in a 1,403-square-foot space, per a recent permit filing. KTP Capital is behind the forthcoming location, which will be the firm's second Crumbl and only the third in the broader Atlanta area. The location is expected to open in late summer.

Pali's Ice Cream Company will open its first brick-and-mortar shop at 7302 Rising Sun Ave in Northeast Philadelphia, in the former Richmond's Ice Cream space. The shop will serve nine soft-serve flavors, 18 hand-dipped flavors, water ice, popsicles, and desserts like funnel cake and deep-fried Oreos. On opening day, owner Ekremah Yaghnam plans to give out free water ice.

Jeffery Java & Juice is a new coffee and donut concept under construction at 7104 S Jeffery Boulevard in South Shore, Chicago, in the former Sunnytown Food Mart space. The concept is owned by local chef Luster Lockhart and will offer vegan donuts, breakfast waffle sandwiches, and Ethiopian coffee. An opening date has not been released.

This article is a profile/retrospective feature on Breakside Brewery, an existing multi-location business, with no opening or closing event reported. The article covers the brewery's history, growth philosophy, and current operations but announces no new location, closure, or remodel.

data.status: set to open its doors in Denver this summer
data.short_description: Michelin-recognized Soda Club from New York will open inside The Ramble Hotel at 1260 25th St in Denver this summer, transforming the former Super Mega Bien space. The restaurant focuses on Italian cuisine with house-made pasta and Roman-style pinsa, led by Executive Chef Amira Gharib. The space will seat 70 indoors and 30 on the patio.

Drifter Coffee in Ferndale closed after seven years, serving its final coffee on May 3. The team announced the closure on Instagram, citing a failed expansion plan to a larger space on Livernois as the beginning of their downfall, compounded by staffing challenges, operational strain, and rising costs. The cafe was founded in 2015 and began as a mobile coffee shop.
